scripts.cap:init: npx cap init starflow-3d com.starflow.game --web-dir dist
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run cap:sync && cd android && bash gradlew assembleDebug && cd .. && adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
scripts.android:debug: cd android && bash gradlew assembleDebug && cd .. && adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk
scripts.android:release: cd android && bash gradlew assembleRelease && cd .. && adb install -r android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/app-release.apk
